network.title: Network Error
network.message: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
network.offline: You are offline. Some features may be limited.
network.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

server.title: Server Error
server.message: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
server.maintenance: Server is under maintenance. Please try again in a few minutes.
server.overload: Server is experiencing high load. Please try again later.

auth.title: Authentication Error
auth.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please contact support.
auth.accountDisabled: Your account has been disabled. Please contact support.
auth.notVerified: Please verify your phone number first.

validation.title: Validation Error
validation.message: Please check your input and try again.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number.

notFound.title: Not Found
notFound.resource: The requested resource was not found.

permission.title: Permission Denied
permission.message: You don't have permission to access this resource.
permission.camera: Camera access denied. Please enable camera permissions.
permission.location: Location access denied. Please enable location permissions.
permission.storage: Storage access denied. Please enable storage permissions.
permission.notifications: Notification permissions denied. Please enable notifications.

data.title: Data Error
data.save: Failed to save data. Please try again.
data.load: Failed to load data. Please try again.
data.delete: Failed to delete data. Please try again.
data.sync: Failed to sync data. Please try again.
data.conflict: Data conflict detected. Please resolve conflicts.
data.offline: Cannot perform this action while offline.
data.offlineSave: Data saved locally. Will sync when online.

file.title: File Error
file.upload: Failed to upload file. Please try again.
file.download: Failed to download file. Please try again.

unknown.title: Unknown Error
unknown.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
unknown.contact: If the problem persists, please contact support.
